### useWillUnmount()

The `useWillUnmount` function is a custom React Hook that executes a callback function when a component is about to unmount. This is useful for cleanup purposes, such as cancelling API requests, removing event listeners, or invalidating timers.

```typescript
export declare function useWillUnmount(callback: () => void): void;
```

#### useWillUnmount的参数


<SiteTableHighlight columns="3" type="1" />

|  参数 | 类型 | 描述 |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  callback | () =&gt; void |  |

<b>返回值:</b>

void
